nasb.text: And he proceeded to send another slave; and they beat him also and treated him shamefully and sent him away empty-handed.

esv.text: And he sent another servant. But they also beat and treated him shamefully, and sent him away empty-handed.

cnv.text: 園主又派另一個僕人去，佃戶又打了他，並且侮辱他，也叫他空手回去。

ccb.text: 园主又派另一个奴仆去，那些佃户照样将他殴打并羞辱一番，使他空手而归。

csbs.text: 园主又派另一个奴仆去，可是他们把那个人也打了，并且侮辱他，叫他空手回去。
